session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.4.0: Thu Mar 19 19:30:44 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.101.15~1/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night is like being enveloped by an endless expanse of mystery and silence. The waves' gentle lapping against the shore creates a soothing melody that seems to ebb and flow with the darkness itself, as if the universe's secrets are whispered in your ear on the wind. In this moment, time and space seem to dissolve, leaving only the infinite vastness of the unknown stretching out before you like an endless, star-studded canvas.
